name: Wingman/Explorer
description: A filesystem abstraction and I/O library for PHP applications. Provides a unified interface for reading, writing, moving, and transforming files across local and remote storage adapters (FTP, HTTP, S3, Azure Blob, GCS, SFTP). Features a negotiation-driven import/export pipeline supporting JSON, JSONL, CSV, INI, YAML, XML, plain text, GZip, Zip, and Tar formats; a flexible Scanner with depth, target, filter, and sort controls; atomic filesystem transactions with automatic rollback; virtual and generated file types; a streaming I/O layer; and Unix-style permission value objects. Integrates with Wingman Cortex for configuration hydration, Wingman Corvus for event emission, and Wingman Synapse for DI. Requires Wingman Locator for path resolution and URI handling.
